address: 10101 Stafford Centre Dr Ste A, Stafford, TX 77477
verification_notes: Self-describes as 'largest individually owned life safety company in TX'. Founded 1990 by Billy R. Corbin Jr. Carries ACR/SCR/ECR plus security license. Multi-location across TX (Houston, Dallas, Austin, Corpus Christi, College Station, Victoria) but single ownership.

signals.evidence: PHMSA Notice of Probable Violation Case 24-0186-CR-SW: FireTron marked DOT spec 4B and 3A/3AL cylinders as requalified from March 2022 through November 2023 while RIN approval had expired May 6, 2021. Violation of 49 CFR 180.205(b).
Active federal case Wray v. Firetron, Inc. et al, Case 4:2026cv01806, filed March 5, 2026 in U.S. District Court Southern District of Texas. Details not public via Justia docket alone.

LinkedIn executive bios reference managing 200+ employees and ~$30M service revenue annually. Six TX offices (Houston, Dallas, Austin, Corpus Christi, College Station, Victoria). Self-branded 'largest individually owned'. Likely $30M+ revenue puts it above small-business ETA threshold.
Billy R. Corbin Jr. founded 1990. Listed as Chairman on CorporationWiki with Debbie Story as VP, indicating transition from CEO already underway — succession planning visible.
Site has online payment portal, contact/quote forms, copyright 2026 in footer. Not coasting — actively operated with modern web presence.

enrichment_notes: TOO LARGE for typical small-biz ETA target — 200+ employees, ~$30M revenue, six TX offices. Owner Billy Corbin Jr. is now Chairman (succession underway with Debbie Story as VP). Active PHMSA regulatory violation and federal lawsuit are flags but not sticky-distress. Recommend DECLINE due to size, not distress.
